_comment: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your values
_whisper_model_note: Options: tiny (~75MB), base (~145MB), small (~480MB), medium (~1.5GB), large (~3GB). 'small' or 'medium' is recommended for Hinglish.
_summary_time_note: 24-hour HH:MM format. The daily summary email is sent at this time.
_check_interval_note: How often (in seconds) the app checks whether a Teams call is active.
_audio_threshold_note: Microphone RMS level above which audio is considered 'active'. Increase (e.g. 0.015) if you get false positives in a noisy environment.

email._password_note: Use your regular Microsoft 365 password. If your org enforces MFA, ask IT to generate an App Password, or use an SMTP relay instead.
